title: Tricky Trails
description: Unnecessary features for the 1.21 Tricky Trials update
body:
A Fabric mod that adds cursed features in relation to the 1.21 Tricky Trials update.
It is recommended to play this mod with 1.21 experimental features enabled.
Adds:
- New ominous events
- Trail chambers and trial ruins structures
- New elemental mobs
- Copper grate and tuff slab golems
